title: Otohime Cries for Her People
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Queen Otohime, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Royal Guards. The core beat is otohime cries for her people.
scene: The scene follows otohime cries for her people, keeping the focus on Queen Otohime, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Royal Guards.

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: I AM SO SORRY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive me for failing to notice your suffering, even though we dwell in the same country...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehh...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the pain that dwells in your heart ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Is as a knife through my own ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!! Aaahhhh!! Truly, the ordeals that drove you to this were terrible!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Uurghh...!! I never... never wanted to do this....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I...!! I had no choice!! There was nothing else I could do!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My shop was burned down by Arsonists....!! All the money I had was stolen....!! I'm clean out of work...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My debts just keep rising...!! And I can't stand to see my children going hungry ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But this is wrong !!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: You cannot respond by doing the same yourself, or the chain of suffering will continue!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: BUEH !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry !!

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: ...and yet!! I must apologise!! We rulers should have been there for our subjects in need... the blame lies with us, as well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Noooo!! You're too kind...!! I don't dese- RVE this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're too kind!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll turn over a new leaf!! Make a new life for myself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Thank you so much... for shedding tears for the likes of me!! Your majesty!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: think nothing of it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wish you all the luck in the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's unusual enough for members of the Royal Family to even leave the castle and walk among the common people...

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Yet Queen Otohime cries genuine tears for her individual citizens and even slaps them around the face...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: She certainly is a most unusual queen...!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: They don't call her the queen of love for nothing ... and just look how popular she is with the children!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: QUEEN OTOHIME EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your nose is running!! This smack is for your own good!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AAR GHH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dripping shot from only one nostril makes you look like a fool....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you must do so, then at least do so from both nostrils ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: QUEEN OTOHIME!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How very moving ...

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: OTOHIME, THE PASSIONATE "QUEEN OF LOVE"...

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: We must raise our ryuguu kingdom above the waves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their skin may be of a different colour... their bodies may differ from ours...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every day, she descends to the island, and mingles with her subjects.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it is not enough for us to wait for the day when the humans come to understand us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must take action ourselves, and strive to understand them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ten thousand metres of ocean water... this is the distance between our culture and theirs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please do not misunder- stand!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The humans that visit our island are a specific type known as "pirates"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ND those humans who purchase from the slave traders are an elite minority known as nobles!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The humans with whom we are familiar are but a tiny fraction of their society!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We still know next to nothing about humanity as a whole!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is why we must move our kingdom, so that our societies can live together under the same sun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this year's upcoming reverie council, I would like to express this wish to the world as a whole!!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: Citizens of this kingdom, I ask for each of your individual signatures!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Someone who knows someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I dunno ...

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Even if it is a request from Queen Otohime...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmph. It's use- less.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: History has already made the answer clear...

summary: Otohime Cries for Her People. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
